name: DC Indoor Golf Club
about: DC Indoor Golf Club is a multi-venue establishment combining indoor golf simulation with a full-service bar and restaurant. The golf facility features PGA Tour Simulators equipped with 3Trak Technology, offering detailed swing data and accurate ball flight metrics across numerous virtual courses. The venue caters to a wide range of players, from beginners to advanced golfers, in a laid-back and family-friendly atmosphere. The on-site Duces Grill provides a full dining menu and an extensive whiskey and spirits selection, making it a destination for both sports enthusiasts and social gatherings.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art PGA Tour Simulators with 3Trak technology for accurate swing data
Access to a large variety of virtual courses for diverse playing experiences
Family-friendly and casual atmosphere suitable for all skill levels

food_and_drink.notes: Full-service kitchen with classic cuisine, including lunch and dinner menus
Full bar with the largest whiskey and spirits selection in the Hudson Valley, over 150 bottles in stock

simulator_hardware.notes: AboutGolf 3Trak Technology (3D High powered photography) providing detailed swing data and true ball flight measurement

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, players must bring their own golf clubs. DC Indoor Golf will provide golf balls, but players caught using their own golf balls will be asked to leave.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not permitted. The venue offers a full kitchen and bar on-site with various food and beverage options.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes is not explicitly stated, but the facility offers various hourly rates, including 1/2 hour, 1 hour, and 10/20 hour cards, suggesting flexible time-based play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, DC Indoor Golf describes its atmosphere as laid-back and family-friendly, welcoming beginners and creating an environment suitable for all players, including children.
